title: Multi-Language Architecture Enforcement (TypeScript + Go parity)
description: Bring TypeScript and Go to parity with Rust in hex's architecture enforcement pipeline. Implements IBuildPort, Go module path resolution, and hexagonal scaffold templates for both languages.

phases.title: IBuildPort trait + multi-language build adapter
tasks: Implement BuildAdapter in hex-nexus with language dispatch (tsc/go build/cargo check)
Wire into AppState and expose via REST endpoint

phases.title: Go module path resolution
tasks: Parse go.mod to extract module path
Map Go import paths to local filesystem paths in treesitter_adapter
Update boundary_checker to use resolved paths for Go files

phases.title: Hexagonal scaffold templates
tasks: Go: generate cmd/, internal/domain/, internal/ports/, internal/adapters/ structure
TypeScript: generate domain/, ports/, adapters/primary/, adapters/secondary/, composition-root.ts
Update generate_readme and generate_start_script for both

phases.title: Frontend checker integration + analyze command
tasks: Add Go single-file analysis to analyze command
Verify all three languages produce correct violations
